bacon-potato-salad-lezzet.name: Bacon Potato Salad

ingredients.item: Half water glass grated parmesan cheese Home

instructions: 1. Mix almonds, parsley, roka, garlic, parmesan cheese, olive oil and lemon juice until it become pure in the kitchen robot.
2. Taste salt with pepper.
3. Wash potatoes and rub the peels from salty water until softened.
4. Cut off the water thoroughly after waiting for a few minutes.
5. Add the sauce and mix well.
6. Add light sauce in 1 teaspoon olive oil and potatoes.
7. Add pies to fine chops and serve.
8.  Afiyet olsun.
9. Remember to add low-calorie classic potato salad recipe among your notes.

bacon-strip-pizza-lezzet.name: Bacon Strip Pizza
instructions: 1. Remove walnut size from bread dough.
2. Roll and roll into long rolls.
3. Press and flat on roll with your hands.
4. Get a little and narrow rectangle with Merdane.
5. Place a fine rusting slice on each dough and the tongue cheese taking wire wire.
6. Eliminate the dough and wrap around it.
7. On 1 egg yolk and fresh thyme sprinkle.
8. Provide 30 minutes of waiting.
9. Pre-heated 180 degree cook until pink.
10. Serve and serve.

baguette-bread-french-toast-teleculinari.name: Baguette Bread French Toast

ingredients.item: Sugar and cinnamon powder to pass

instructions: To prepare these French toasts, pour the sugar into a pot, add the milk, stir well, add the lemon peel and cinnamon stick, take it to the fire and let it warm well, stirring from time to time.
Cut the cocks into not very thin slices. Remove the milk from the fire, let it cool a little, pass the fucking slices and put them on a tray.

Light a frying pan with oil and let it warm. Pass the slices of bread through the egg shakes and make them fry until they're brown on both sides. Remove, let it drip on a sheet of kitchen paper, then pass them through a mixture of sugar and cinnamon and serve warm or cold.

baileys-minty-martini.name: Baileys Minty Martini
instructions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice; add Baileys and peppermint liqueur.
Cover and shake until the outside of the shaker is frosted.
Strain into a festive martini glass.
Shave dark chocolate over top to serve.

baja-style-tempura-fish.name: Baja-style Tempura Fish

ingredients.prep: lime wedges, and pickled jalapeño rings

instructions: To make the marinade, in a large bowl, combine the 1 1/2 cups water, lime juice, garlic, chiles, oregano, and salt. Add the fish strips and let marinate for at least 20 minutes.

To make the tempura batter, in a separate bowl, whisk together the ice water and mustard. Gently stir in the flour, but don’t overmix; a few small lumps are okay. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Drain the shark pieces and pat them dry with a paper towel.

Have a plate lined with paper towels ready. In a large, heavy-bottomed pot, heat at least 2 to 3 inches of oil over medium heat until it reaches 182°C on a deep-fat thermometer. Remove the batter from the refrigerator and stir once more. Dredge the fish pieces in the batter, a few at a time, to evenly coat. Drop them in the hot fat, 2 pieces at a time, adding 2 more pieces every 30 seconds (fry no more than 4 pieces at a time). Monitor the temperature of the hot oil throughout frying, letting the oil return to proper temperature, if necessary, between batches; to ensure crispness, it must remain a constant 182°C to 193°C. If too low, the fish will be oily; if too hot, the pieces will burn.

Fry them until crisp, light golden brown, and floating in the oil, about 2 1/2 minutes per batch. With a fine-mesh skimmer, transfer the fish tempura to the paper-towel-lined plate to absorb the excess oil. Repeat with the remaining pieces of fish. During frying, be sure to remove any pieces of floating batter, or they will burn and darken the oil, which will transfer a burned flavor to the tempura. Serve immediately.

To serve, lay the tortillas side by side, open face and overlapping on a platter. Divide the slaw and filling equally between the tortillas and top with salsa and garnish. Grab, fold, and eat right away. Or build your own taco: lay a tortilla, open face, in one hand. Spoon on some slaw, then filling, top with salsa, fold, and eat right away.

baked-brie.name: Baked Brie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease a baking sheet or line with parchment paper.
Slice Brie cheese wheel in half so you have 2 circles of cheese. Spread preserves on the cut side of one circle of Brie; arrange remaining circle of Brie rind-side up on top.
Wrap the entire wheel of Brie with one sheet of puff pastry; transfer onto the prepared baking sheet seam-side down. Brush puff pastry with egg white.
Bake in the reheated oven until pastry in golden brown, about 30 minutes. Serve immediately.

baked-chicken-with-onion-recipe-step-by-.name: Baked Chicken with Onion Receives step by step
baked-chicken-with-onion-recipe-step-by-.original_name: Receta pollo al horno con cebolla paso a paso
instructions: It starts the recipe and challenges the oven at 200 been 3.
Wash your thighs well and remove any feathers or big pieces of fat you may have.
Put your thighs into a bowl and add the soy sauce, onion, garlic, adobo, salt and pepper.
Mix very well so that flavors are integrated into the thigh.
At an oven-free fountain, place the thighs and cover with onion and wine and place the rosemary in the middle and edges. A cover with an aluminium paper.
Enter the oven and let cook for 30 minutes. Then get the hell and wash the fingers with the juice you get and let them cook for 10 more minutes till they get juicy.
Turn off the oven and remove from the fountain and serve with your favorite garrison.
Enjoy!

baked-chicken-with-sauce-recipe-lezzet.name: Baked Chicken With Sauce Recipe

ingredients.item: 6 chicken but or baget (optionally thunder or pillar can also be used)

instructions: 1. Add yogurt, olive oil, sal&ccedil to a mixing container, crushed garlic, spices and lemon juice and mix well.
2. Bug the chicken parçif this sauce.
3. At 30 minutes (if possible 2–3 hours) in the marinade in the refrigerator, the flavor is thoroughly turned into.
4. Marine chickens index to oven tray.
5. See the dried sauce of chickens
6. Öpreheated from 19 degrees to 40–45 minutes.
7. Continue cooking up to chickens girl.
8. You can serve with fresh peppers ready to serve sauce chicken in the oven.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

baked-sweet-potato-chaat.name: Baked Sweet Potato Chaat

ingredients.prep: halved, ribs and  seeds removed, coarsely  chopped

ingredients.item: Pomegranate seeds and mild chile flakes

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Prick 4 medium sweet potatoes (about 2½ lb.) all over with a fork; run under water to dampen (this will encourage steaming and help soften potatoes when baking). Place on a rimmed baking sheet. Drizzle 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil over and season with kosher salt; turn to coat. Roast until skins are lightly crisped, 30–35 minutes.
Place two 15.5-oz. cans chickpeas, rinsed, patted dry, in a medium bowl. Drizzle in ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil and sprinkle with 1 Tbsp. ground cumin and 1 Tbsp. chaat masala; toss to coat.
Add chickpeas to baking sheet with sweet potatoes and spread out in a single layer. Roast until potatoes are tender and chickpeas are browned and crisped, 15–20 minutes.

Meanwhile, pick a few leaves from 1 bunch cilantro for serving and set aside. Coarsely chop remaining cilantro leaves and tender stems and transfer to a blender; discard tough stems. Add 4 scallions, coarsely chopped, 1 jalapeño, halved, ribs and  seeds removed, coarsely  chopped, ¼ cup fresh lime juice, and remaining ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil and blend until smooth; season sauce with salt. Set aside.
Toss ⅓ cup store-bought fried onions in a small bowl with a pinch of chaat masala; set aside.

Arrange sweet potatoes on a platter. Split; open like a baked potato. Top with chickpeas, then ⅔ cup plain whole-milk yogurt and reserved sauce. Scatter ½ small red onion, finely chopped, pomegranate seeds, and reserved fried onions on top; sprinkle with mild chile flakes.

banana-bread-nutella-brownies.name: Banana Bread-nutella Brownies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9x13-inch baking pan.

Beat sugar, sour cream, softened butter, and eggs together in a bowl until creamy. Add mashed bananas and vanilla extract and blend again. Add flour, baking soda, and salt and blend again until smooth and creamy. Fold in walnuts. Spread batter evenly into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, 20 to 25 minutes.
Remove brownies from the oven, leaving oven on. Add chocolate-hazelnut spread to the top without spreading.
Return pan to the hot oven until chocolate-hazelnut spread is softened, 2 to 3 minutes. Remove from oven and spread chocolate-hazelnut spread over brownies.
Cut cooled brownies into 20 squares.

barbies-blueberry-zucchini-bread-with-oa.name: Barbie's Blueberry Zucchini Bread With Oatmeal And Walnuts
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease 2 standard loaf pans or 4 mini loaf pans with cooking spray.
Beat sugar, oil, eggs, and vanilla extract in a large bowl until smooth. Fold in zucchini.

Sift flour, cinnamon, salt, and baking soda together in another bowl. Stir in oats and coconut. Add flour mixture to zucchini mixture; mix slowly until combined. Fold blueberries and walnuts into the batter.
Divide batter among prepared loaf pans.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 50 minutes. Cool for 20 minutes before serving.

barley-and-chickpea-stew-recipe-comedera.name: Barley And Chickpea Stew Recipe
barley-and-chickpea-stew-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de estofado de cebada y garbanzos

ingredients.item: 1 taza de garbanzos cocidos  ((pueden ser de lata, bien enjuagados))
1 cdote of sweet or smoked peppermint

instructions: If you have no baked chickpeas, put them in moist last night and cook them till they're tender. Also, rinse well the pitted barley and preserve it.
In a big saucer, heat up some olive oil at medium heat. Add onion, garlic, carrot and celery. Cooking for about 8- 10 minutes till the vegetables are tender and golden.
Incorporates pimenton, cumin, salt and pepper to suit. Cooking for another minute so that the spices will loosen their smell. Then add the crushed tomato and cook for about 5 more minutes.

Add the purified barley and stir well with the sodith. Fold the vegetable stock and the bay leaves. It leads to boiling, and then reduces fire and cooks with low heat for about 25 to 30 minutes, or till barley is tender.
Add baked chickpeas to stew and cook for another 10 minutes, allowing all flavors to blend well.
Prueba y ajusta la sal y pimienta si es necesario. Retira las hojas de laurel antes de servir.
Sirve caliente, decorado con perejil fresco picado para darle un toque de color y frescura.

basic-crepe-recipe-lezzet.name: Basic Crepe Recipe
instructions: 1. Pour the egg, milk, water, oil, salt and flour into a bowl and cool in the refrigerator for 25 minutes.
2. Heat a large pan with non-stick surface in medium fire.
3. Take a small amount of melted butter with brush.
4. Transfer it to the pan by taking 1 bucket from the crepe dough and thoroughly broadcast.
5. Quickly turn on the edges with the spatulas, starting to form bubbles on it.
6. Transfer two sides to the tab with light-free, and repeat the process until the whole dough is finished.

basic-pastry-cake-lezzet.name: Basic Pastry Cake
instructions: 1. Spray the egg yolks for 2-3 minutes with mixer.
2. Add half of the sugar and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Add and mix the vanilla.
4. thoroughly whip eggs in a separate bowl.
5. Continue to cook until the sugar is added and joined.
6. Add the egg yolks and mix without whipping with the spatula.
7. Add flour and corn flour and gently mix.
8. Add the butter and transfer the mixture with oil paper serial clamped caliba and cook about 30 minutes in the oven set to 180 degrees.
9. Leave the reverse cool on the grid wire.

batter-for-cod-argiro.name: Batter For Cod
instructions: Shake the flower with baking powder in a medium bowl.
Add the salt and sugar and mix the solid injectors with egg.
Then add the liquid iredients, ouzo and soda, and mix lightly with the egg.
To dilute the composition and freeze quickly, pour in two large ice cubes, creating a smooth Porridge. In this resolution, turdways get very crispy.
Cover the bowl and place it on the cooler shelf for 20-30 minutes. Alternatively, we can put it in the freezer for 5 minutes.
After the Porridge comes out of the refrigerator, leave it on the counter for a few minutes and mix lightly with a sponge.
After resting and Cooling, the composition of the Porridge changes: it becomes thinker and fluid.
So we get the perfect code turd, crispy and delicious.

bbq-spice-rub-blend.name: Bbq Spice Rub Blend
instructions: Combine brown sugar, paprika, garlic powder, chili powder, onion powder, cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
Pour into a small glass container and secure with an airtight lid. Store up to 1 year.
Enjoy!

beans-with-rice-and-vegetables-argiro.name: Beans With Rice And Vegetables

ingredients.item: A little dill for the finish
A little dill for the finish

instructions: Soak the rice in water for a while and, when the liquid is white, rhinse Thoroughly and set aside.
Rinse the Beans and bottle for 20 minutes to soften. We drag them.
Heat in a pot some olive oil and sauté the onion with leek for 5-7 minutes, make it translate.
Add the paste, half built Beans, Carrot and 5 cups hot water. After building, lower the heat and boat for 10 minutes over medium heat.
Add the price, lower the heat and cook for 20 more minutes. We pay partial attention to the intensity of the fire so that we don't have strong building because the liquids in the vehicle are fed.
Sprinkle with salt, pepper and some finely chopped dill.
In the end, the food should not be complete dry, but should be left with a little tinted zoom.
Add the remaining olive oil and mix. Allow it to stand for 5 minutes covered and serve with lemon quarters.

beef-roll-stuffed-on-coals-argiro.name: Beef Roll Stuffed On Coals
instructions: Add garlic, onions, parsley, cheeses, toast and some oil.
Salt and pepper and mix with a sponge.
We ask the butcher to open the fillet along to fill it.
We can open it with a sharp knife by flattening it.
Spread the filling on the meat leaving a gap of 2 cm around. Press the filling with our palm sticking to the meat.
We're starting to roll the fillet too tight. Tie the roll to five points.
Wrap it with membrane, too, very tight and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Then remove the membrane and with a sharp knife cut into nick slides between the strings.
Add some oil to each piece. We go through every slide of meat from two soups diagonally.
Bake for 6 minutes and turn over. Continue baking for 5 ́-6 ́ extra.
Transfer to a platter and serve with vegetarian salad.

beef-tacos-with-guacamole-sour-cream-and.name: Beef Tacos With Guacamole, Sour Cream And Pico De Gallo

ingredients.prep: (if you have only big tortillas, cut them into regular DVD sized circles.)

instructions: For the guacamole: Mash together ingredients in a bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and let chill in the fridge.

For the pico de gallo: In a medium-sized bowl, combine the onions, fresh cilantro, chopped garlic, *pickled jalapeño, cherry tomatoes, lime juice, salt and pepper. Cover with plastic wrap and let chill in the fridge.

For the meat: Into a large pan, turn on the low heat and combine the oil with the butter. Add the ground beef and pork and mix them until combined. Turn on the medium heat, then add the taco seasoning.

Once the taco meat mixture is cooked, turn off the heat and preheat your oven to 180°C (180°C) . On an inverted (upside-down) cupcake tin, place the small tortillas in crevices to create ‘taco shells.’ Place in the oven and let dry for 10-15 minutes until crisp.
To serve: Fill each taco shell with 2 tbsp meat mixture and garnish/assemble with condiments and toppings as desired.

beginners-turkey-with-stuffing.name: Beginner's Turkey With Stuffing

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Remove and discard giblets. Pat turkey dry with paper towels. Place turkey in a shallow roasting pan.
Bring water and 4 tablespoons butter to a boil in a medium saucepan. Stir in stuffing mix, cover, remove from the heat, and let rest for 5 minutes.
While stuffing is resting, melt remaining 1 tablespoon butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add celery and onion; cook and stir until tender, 5 to 7 minutes.
Add celery and onion to the stuffing. Mix in toasted bread pieces and season with salt and pepper.
Loosely scoop stuffing into the body and neck cavities of the turkey. Rub exterior of the turkey with vegetable oil and loosely cover with aluminum foil.

Roast turkey in the preheated oven until an instant-read thermometer inserted in the thickest part of the thigh reaches 82°C (85 degrees C) and the interior of the stuffing reaches 74°C (70 degrees C), about 3 ½ to 4 hours. Remove foil during the last 30 minutes of cooking to brown the skin.
Let the turkey rest, covered loosely with foil, before carving.

berlin-balls-teleculinaria.name: Berlin Balls

ingredients.item: 100 g of butter at room temperature

instructions: To prepare this recipe, pour the water into the robot cup and program at 37 In the last 15 seconds, add the yeast through the hole. Then add the butter, eggs, sugar, flour and a pinch of salt and call at the special speed for pasta for 5 minutes. Sprinkle with a little more flour if necessary until the dough starts taking off the glass. Remove the dough, wrap it, place it in a bowl sprinkled with flour, cut it in cross over, cover it with a damp cloth and let it leave, in warm place, until it is almost twice the size.
The filling: Lay the sugar and lemon peel on the washed glass and turn on 20 seconds at speed 9. Add the flour, yolks and milk and program at 100 Take it off, put it in a bowl and let it cool.

Divide the dough in 18 portions, wrap them in the shape of polka dots, place them on top of a kitchen cloth sprinkled with flour and leave another 10 minutes. Bring a pan or deep fryer to the fire with abundant oil, let it heat but not too hot and fry the balls of pasta on both sides to taste.
Remove, have it dripping on a sheet of paper and cut them with a knife. Then pass them through a mixture of sugar and cinnamon and stuff them with the cream using a pastry bag.

black-garlic.name: Black Garlic
instructions: Place a rice cooker in your garage or on an outside porch if possible; the garlic will release a very strong odor as it cooks.
Place garlic in the rice cooker.
Cover and cook on the Keep Warm setting for 2 weeks, without opening the lid.
After 2 weeks, check garlic. It should be soft, fermented, and black in color.
If not, continue to cook on the same setting, checking weekly, 1 to 4 more weeks.

black-sesame-melon-pan.name: Black Sesame Melon Pan

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt
Nonstick vegetable oil spray or vegetable oil
A spice mill and a 3 0.25"-diameter cutter

instructions: Whisk together ¼ cup bread flour (31 g), ⅓ cup whole milk, and ⅓ cup cold water in a cold small saucepan. Place over medium heat and cook, whisking often, until a thick paste forms, about 2 minutes. Measure out ½ cup (125 g) tangzhong and discard any remaining. Let cool until lukewarm, about 15 minutes.

Combine tangzhong, 2 large eggs, ¼ cup (50 g) granulated sugar, 3 Tbsp. heavy cream, 2¼ tsp. active dry yeast, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, remaining 2¾ cups (344 g) bread flour, and remaining 3 Tbsp. whole milk in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the dough hook. Mix on low speed 3 minutes, then increase speed to medium and continue to mix, scraping down sides of bowl occasionally if needed, until dough is smooth, about 10 minutes.

With motor running, gradually add 3 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into ½" pieces, room temperature, a couple pieces at a time. Once butter is fully incorporated, continue to mix 3 minutes (dough will be smooth and slightly tacky).

Lightly coat a large bowl with nonstick vegetable oil spray or vegetable oil and transfer dough to bowl; turn dough to coat. Cover with a lid, large plate, or plastic wrap and let sit in a warm, draft-free spot until doubled in size, 1½–2 hours.
Meanwhile, finely grind ⅓ cup (50 g) black sesame seeds in spice mill (stop grinding before seeds turn to a paste).

Beat 1 cup (110 g) powdered sugar and 6 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature, in the clean bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on medium speed until smooth and creamy; scrape down sides of bowl with a rubber spatula. Add 1 large egg and 1 tsp. vanilla extract and beat until well combined, about 2 minutes (mixture will look slightly curdled; that’s okay). Add ground sesame seeds, 2 cups (230 g) cake flour, sifted, ½ tsp. baking powder, and ¼ tsp. kosher salt and mix on low speed, scraping down sides occasionally, until a dough forms, about 2 minutes.

Divide black sesame dough in half. Working with one half at a time, roll out dough between large sheets of parchment paper to ⅛" thick. Stack sheets of dough, still sandwiched between parchment, then slide onto a baking sheet and chill until firm, at least 45 minutes, or until ready to use.

When shokupan is doubled in size, punch down and turn out onto a lightly floured surface. Divide dough into 14 equal pieces (50 g each if using a scale). Working one at a time, flatten each piece with your palm, then fold all edges up toward the center and pinch together to close (it should look a little like a dumpling). Turn dough seam side down. With your hand cupped over dough (dough should be positioned between the edge of your hand and the fleshy part below your thumb), roll dough in a circular motion, keeping seam constantly touching surface, until a tight ball forms. Turn seam side up.

Working with 1 sheet at a time, remove black sesame dough from fridge. Peel off top sheet of parchment and lightly place it back over dough; turn dough over and remove second sheet of parchment. Punch out rounds with cutter. Using a small offset spatula, lift rounds off parchment and drape over shokupan balls (ensure black sesame dough covers seam on shokupan). Gently mold black sesame dough around shokupan by cupping in your palm (cookie will not cover the entire ball). If rounds become too soft to work with at any point, chill until firm but pliable before continuing, 5–10 minutes.

Place ½ cup (100 g) granulated sugar in a small bowl. Working one at a time, roll cookie topping side of each bun in sugar. Divide buns between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing about 2" apart. Using a sharp paring knife, carefully score top of each bun to make a grid, being careful not to slice into shokupan. Cover buns loosely with plastic wrap and let sit in a warm, draft-free spot until doubled in size, about 1 hour.

Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 177°C. Bake buns, rotating bakingsheets top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until bread is golden brown (an instant read thermometer will register 93°C), 17–20 minutes. Cookie topping will spread and crackle as buns bake. Let buns cool on baking sheets until warm before serving, about 15 minutes.
Do ahead: Buns can be baked 4 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature, or chill up to 1 week, or freeze up to 6 months. Bring to room temperature before serving.

black-eyed-peas-salad-with-artichoke-hea.name: Black-eyed Peas Salad With Artichoke Hearts
instructions: 1. Shrewed with plenty of waters and broths until they are washed and softened.
2. Leave the water to cool.
3. After cooling, add and blend thin chopped fresh onion, dereotu, parsley, cube cut red pepper, grain corn and enginar hearts.
4. Mix olive oil and lemon juice in another bowl and go on the salad.
5. Taste Tuzla.
6. Serve.

blackberry-jam.name: Blackberry Jam
instructions: Mash blackberries in a saucepan with a potato masher.
Stir in sugar until juices are released. Remove 1 tablespoon blackberry juice from the saucepan; mix with cornstarch in a small bowl. Stir cornstarch mixture back into the saucepan.
Bring blackberries to a boil; cook, stirring often, until jam has thickened, about 15 minutes.
Stir in cinnamon and allspice. Remove saucepan from the heat and allow jam to cool, 30 to 45 minutes.
Transfer jam to a bowl, cover, and refrigerate until chilled. Stir in lemon juice before serving.

blistered-asparagus-frittata.name: Blistered Asparagus Frittata

ingredients.item: (packed) arugula or other tender salad greens

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Whisk eggs and cream in a medium bowl until no streaks remain. Stir in Gruyère and arugula; set aside.
Separate woody ends from asparagus spears; thinly slice ends and set aside.

Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large cast-iron or ovenproof nonstick skillet over medium-high. Cook asparagus spears, tossing occasionally, until crisp-tender and blistered in spots, 5–8 minutes. Season with salt and transfer to a plate.

Add 1 Tbsp. oil to same skillet. Cook red onion, garlic, oregano, and reserved asparagus ends, stirring occasionally, until onion is softened and asparagus is tender, about 5 minutes. Season generously with salt and pepper.

Swirl remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in skillet and wait 30 seconds before pouring in reserved egg mixture. Arrange asparagus spears in a single layer on top. Cook, undisturbed, until egg mixture is set at the edges, about 3 minutes.
Transfer skillet to oven and bake frittata until puffed slightly and center is just set, 15–17 minutes. Let cool in pan 15 minutes.

Just before serving, scatter chives over frittata and season with more pepper.
Do Ahead: Frittata can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool completely; wrap in foil and chill, or freeze up to 3 months. Reheat in a 300° oven until warmed through, 30–40 minutes.

blood-orange-mimosa.name: Blood Orange Mimosa
instructions: {'step': 'Dip the rims of 4 champagne flutes in water.'}
{'step': '2. Dip into sanding sugar to coat the rims.'}
{'step': '3. Divide Champagne among the flutes.'}
{'step': '4. Pour 2 tablespoons pineapple juice and 2 tablespoons blood orange juice into each.'}
{'step': '5. Top mimosas with orange liqueur.'}

blt-turkey-burgers.name: Blt Turkey Burgers
instructions: Stir vinegar, sugar, salt, and garlic in a medium bowl until sugar and salt are dissolved. Add zucchini and onion. Let sit until slightly softened, 10–15 minutes.
Do Ahead: Vegetables can be pickled 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

Prepare a grill for medium-high, indirect heat (for a charcoal grill, bank coals on one side of grill; for a gas grill, leave one or two burners off). Oil grate. Grill bacon over indirect heat, moving around and turning as needed to minimize flare-ups (you can even briefly put it over direct heat to speed things up) until browned and crisp, 8–10 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Shape turkey sausage into 4 patties. Grill over direct heat, moving to indirect heat if browning too quickly, until browned and cooked through, 6–8 minutes. Top patties with cheese if desired and cook until melted, about 1 minute.
Lightly toast buns while cheese is melting. Build burgers with buns, turkey patties, drained zucchini pickles, bacon, tomato, avocado, and lettuce.

blueberry-coffee-cake.name: Blueberry Coffee Cake

ingredients.item: Plus 2 tbsp. (packed; 80 g) dark brown sugar
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. plus  0.125 tsp. morton kosher salt
Fresh or frozen blueberries (about 10 oz.; if frozen

instructions:
Whisk ½ cup (63 g) all-purpose flour, ¼ cup plus 2 Tbsp. (packed; 80 g) dark brown sugar, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. plus ⅛ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl. Stir in ¼ cup pecans, toasted, chopped. Add 3 Tbsp. chilled unsalted butter, cut into ¼" cubes; using your fingertips, work butter into dry ingredients until large, moist crumbs form. Set topping aside.
Do Ahead: Crumb topping an be made 5 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Place rack in center of oven; preheat oven to 350°. Coat 8x8x2" metal baking dish with nonstick spray. Line bottom with parchment paper and spray paper; set aside. Whisk 1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour, 1 Tbsp. cornmeal, ½ tsp. baking powder, ½ tsp. baking soda, and ¼ tsp. kosher salt in a medium bowl; set aside.

Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat ¾ cup (150 g) granulated sugar and 6 Tbsp. (¾ stick) unsalted butter, room temperature, in a large bowl until light and fluffy, 3–4 minutes. Beat in ½ tsp. vanilla extract. Add 2 large eggs, room temperature, one at a time, beating to blend between additions and occasionally scraping down sides of bowl, until mixture is pale and fluffy, 3–4 minutes longer.

With mixer on low speed, add flour mixture to bowl in 3 additions, alternating with 1 cup buttermilk, room temperature, in 2 additions, beginning and ending with reserved dry ingredients. Pour half of cake batter into prepared pan and smooth top. Whisk remaining 3 Tbsp. granulated sugar and 1 Tbsp. ground cinnamon in a small bowl; sprinkle evenly over batter in pan. Spoon remaining batter over; smooth top.
Toss 2 cups blueberries with 1 Tbsp. panko in a small bowl; scatter evenly over batter. Sprinkle crumb topping over blueberries.

Bake cake until top is golden brown and a toothpick or cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 55–65 minutes. Let cool completely in pan.
Do Ahead: Cake can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
Editor’s note: This blueberry coffee cake recipe was first printed in our September 2012 issue. Head this way for more of our favorite cake recipes →

blueberry-croissant-bread-pudding.name: Blueberry Croissant Bread Pudding
instructions: Preheat the oven to 107°C (110 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and spread out croissant cubes on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until croissant cubes are very dry, 30 to 35 minutes. Turn off the oven and cool cubes slightly.
Lightly spray a 9x13-inch baking dish, add dried croissants, and evenly distribute the blueberries among the croissant cubes.

Whisk eggs together in a large bowl. Add milk, heavy cream, sugar, butter, almond extract, cinnamon, and salt; whisk until well blended. Pour the custard mixture over the croissants, and push croissant cubes down with the palm of your hand or a large spatula to fully submerge. Cover the dish and refrigerate for 2 hours to allow the bread to absorb all of the custard.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven, uncovered, until the top is puffed and golden and the custard is set in the center, 40 to 45 minutes.
Remove the bread pudding to a rack and let cool for 10 minutes.

blueberry-muffin-oatmeal-bake.name: Blueberry Muffin Oatmeal Bake

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 375°. Butter an 8x8" baking pan or dish with unsalted butter. Toss 2½ cups old-fashioned oats, ½ cup sliced almonds, 3 Tbsp. chia seeds, and 1 tsp. baking powder in a medium bowl to combine. Add 1½ cups fresh or frozen blueberries and toss to coat.

Mix 1 large egg, ½ cup almond butter, ½ cup (packed; 100 g) dark brown sugar, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. ground cinnamon, ¼ tsp. freshly ground nutmeg, ½ tsp. almond extract (if using), and ½ tsp. vanilla extract in a large bowl to combine. Pour in ½ cup of 2½ cups milk of choice milk and whisk until almond butter mixture is dissolved and incorporated. Gradually pour in remaining milk, whisking constantly to combine. Pour over oat mixture and stir to combine.

Transfer oatmeal mixture to prepared baking dish, making sure blueberries are evenly distributed. Make a few divots over surface with a large spoon and fill with dollops from ¼ cup blueberry jam. Sprinkle remaining ¼ cup sliced almonds over.

Place baking dish on a rimmed baking sheet and bake oatmeal until slightly puffed and almonds are toasted, 30–40 minutes (if using frozen blueberries or a glass baking dish, oatmeal may need another 5–10 minutes). Let cool 5 minutes.
Divide oatmeal among bowls. Drizzle with pure maple syrup and/or milk of choice and finely grate zest of 1 lemon over if desired.

bolan.name: Bolan

ingredients.item: Palm sugar or  0.5 teaspoon granulated sugar

instructions: Muddle orange slices, bitters, and palm sugar in an Old Fashioned glass. Fill with ice and add whiskey. Garnish with lychee, if desired.

bolinho-de-arroz-with-molho-verde.name: Bolinho De Arroz With Molho Verde

ingredients.item: (lightly packed) parsley leaves with tender stems
Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions:
Purée scallions, garlic, parsley, milk, lime juice, salt, and sugar in a blender until smooth. Add oil and blend until sauce thickens slightly. Transfer to a small bowl.
Do Ahead: Molho verde can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Rinse rice in a fine-mesh sieve under cold running water until water runs clear; drain well. Bring rice and 2 cups water to a boil in a small saucepan. Reduce heat to low, cover pan, and cook until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed, 15–20 minutes. Remove from heat, uncover, and let cool.

Mix rice, egg, flour, milk, onion, salt, garlic, ginger, and rosemary in a medium bowl until well combined. Scoop out 2 heaping tablespoonfuls of rice mixture and roll into a ball with your hands, then flatten into a 3"-diameter patty. Using your thumb, make a shallow indentation in the center of patty; place a piece of cheddar inside. Pinch rice mixture together to encase cheese; roll into a smooth ball. Transfer rice ball to a plate; repeat with remaining rice mixture (you should have about 12 rice balls).
Fit a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot with thermometer. Pour in oil to come 3" up sides. Heat over medium-high until thermometer registers 350°.
Working in 2 batches, carefully lower rice balls into oil with a slotted spoon or spider. Fry, turning often, until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Transfer to paper towels to drain.
Serve hot with molho verde alongside.

bombay-sandwich-recipe-lezzet.name: Bombay Sandwich Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 bundle of fresh chalk (can be used in the mixture of oxa yeast + mint)
2 medium size boiled potatoes – fine slice
2 mins of butter (press in the machine for)

instructions: 1. Prepare a dark consistency, freshly flavored chutney in the kitchen robot of fresh cough, mint, yogurt, garlic, lemon juice, green pepper and salt.
2. Take a thin layer of sostan on a face of tost bread.
3. Place bread slices u in turn cooked potatoes, tomato paste, tenions rings and cheeses of eggs.
4. If you wish, you can sprinkle a little salt, pepper and pepper between layers.
5. Pretty close with bread slice.

bourbon-and-baby-bella-mushroom-sauce.name: Bourbon And Baby Bella Mushroom Sauce
instructions: Combine bourbon, soy sauce, brown sugar, Worcestershire sauce, basil, rosemary, and pepper in a small bowl; whisk until blended and sugar is dissolved.

Heat a skillet over medium heat. Add 1 tablespoon clarified butter and 1/3 of the mushrooms; saute until nicely browned, 5 to 7 minutes. Remove mushrooms to a plate and repeat with remaining batches, adding more butter as needed.

Add shallots to the skillet and saute until tender, about 5 minutes. Return browned mushrooms to the skillet and pour in bourbon mixture. Cook over medium heat until slightly reduced, scraping the bottom as you cook, 2 to 3 minutes. Reduce heat and stir in heavy cream. Simmer until blended and thickened to desired consistency, 3 to 5 minutes. Season with salt.

bran-muffins.name: Bran Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease 12 muffin cups or line with paper muffin liners.
Mix wheat bran and buttermilk together in a large bowl; let stand for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, beat brown sugar, oil, egg, and vanilla together in a separate bowl until light and fluffy; stir into buttermilk mixture.
Sift flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt together; stir into buttermilk mixture until just blended. Fold in raisins; spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each 2/3 full.
Bake in the preheated oven until tops spring back when lightly pressed, about 15 to 20 minutes. Cool in the tin briefly, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely. Enjoy!

bread-of-kythira-argiro.name: Bread Of Kythira

ingredients.item: A little sesame for the finish
Few float olive oil for the baking pan
A little sesame for the finish
Few float olive oil for the baking pan

instructions: In a bowl, mix the flower, yeast, cinnamon and clove.
In another bowl, add the honey, the lukewarm water and mix to dissolve.
Add the Juice, zest and oil and mix.
We puddle the flour, add the liquids and mix with a sponge until the mixture is brought.
Add some olive oil to the hands and knead on the counter until it becomes soft and supple or dough.
Place the dough in an oily bowl, cover it and allow it to swell for 1 to 1.5 hours.
Press by kneading the puffed dough to deflate complete.
Create the Kythira bread and put it in oiled small baking pan 26 cm.
We gently push the bread to spread.
Cover with wet towel and place in a hot oven at 50oC to rise and swell for 40 minutes.
After doing the bread, brush it with some sugar water and make a cross shape on the surface with sesame.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 180oC in the air for about 35′ until golden.
Leave to stand on the baking pan for 15 minutes, then put the grill on a towel to cool.

briam-argiro.name: Briam
instructions: Preheat the evening to 200°C in air and residence.
Cut the eggs into 6 pieces, the pumpkins to 6 (like big bites), 4-5 cm (they will drink to baking), tomatoes to 4 and potatoes to 6.

Add the garage and olive oil to the blender and pour the food, add salt, pepper and sprinkle with the herbs.
Mix them with your hands or with two seeds.
Dissolve the paste in the water and pour the briam (don't look at the sauce).
Place the baking pan in the oven (preheated) and baking 40'-45' in the first half hour covered.
Then we expresse it.
It is a food served lukewarmly or at room temperature.

instructions: 1. Bitter erythese, leave to lightly.

brown-butter-steel-cut-oatmeal.name: Brown Butter Steel-cut Oatmeal
instructions: Select Sauté on the Instant Pot and melt the butter. Add the oats and sauté, stirring often, for about 5 minutes, until aromatic and lightly toasted. Add the water and salt and stir to combine, making sure all of the oats are submerged in the liquid.
Secure the lid and set the Pressure Release to Sealing. Press the Cancel button to reset the cooking program, then select the Porridge settingand set the cooking time for 12 minutes at high pressure.

Let the pressure release naturally for at least 10 minutes, then move the Pressure Release to Venting to release any remaining steam. Open the pot and stir the oatmeal to incorporate any extra liquid.
Ladle the oatmeal into bowls and serve with brown sugar and cream.
Apple cinnamon: Stir in 1 apple, chopped, and ½ teaspoon cinnamon with the water.
Pumpkin spice: Stir in 1 cup pumpkin puree, ¼ cup maple syrup, and ¾ teaspoon pumpkin pie spice with the water.
Peanut butter–banana: Stir ¼ cup creamy peanut butter into the finished oatmeal. Top each serving with banana slices.
Blueberry almond/pecan: Top each serving with a handful of fresh blueberries, a scattering of toasted sliced almonds or pecans, and a drizzle of honey.
Savory sesame soy: Omit the salt. Stir in 2 tablespoons soy sauce and add ½ teaspoon toasted sesame oil with the water. Serve topped with a fried egg.

brown-sugar-and-port-cranberry-sauce.name: Brown Sugar And Port Cranberry Sauce
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine the cranberries, brown sugar, orange zest and juice, and port wine. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring until the sugar has dissolved. Reduce the heat to medium-low, and simmer until the cranberries have popped and the sauce has thickened, about 15 minutes. Cool, and refrigerate overnight before serving.

brown-sugar-berry-cobbler.name: Brown Sugar Berry Cobbler

ingredients.item: To 1 cup plus 1 teaspoon packed dark brown sugar (depending on sweetness of berries)

ingredients.prep: strawberries trimmed and halved if using

instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C with rack in middle.
Stir together 3/4 to 1 cup brown sugar and cornstarch in a large bowl. Add berries and toss to coat. Transfer mixture to a shallow 3-quart baking dish and bake until mixture is hot, about 12 minutes.

Meanwhile, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl. Add butter and blend with your fingertips or a pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse meal with some roughly pea-size butter lumps. Add milk and stir until dough just comes together.

Remove baking dish from oven and drop 12 mounds of dough onto hot berries. Stir together remaining teaspoon brown sugar and granulated sugar and sprinkle over dough. Bake cobbler until topping is golden, 25 to 30 minutes. Cool to warm, about 30 minutes.

brunch-bake.name: Brunch Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (180°C).
Cut each biscuit into 9 pieces. Set aside.
In a bowl, mix eggs, milk, pepper, salt, and chives.
In a 9x13 inch (23x33 cm) glass baking dish, evenly spread out the biscuit pieces and the ham.
Pour the egg mixture over everything.
Bake for 35 minutes.
To make the Hollandaise combine the egg yolks, lemon juice, salt, and cayenne in a blender. Gradually add the hot butter until fully mixed.
Slice and pour Hollandaise sauce over the bake. Top with chives
Enjoy!

bruschetta-with-prosciutto-argiro.name: Bruschetta With Prosciutto

ingredients.item: 2 cups of cream or goat (pecant, cramy fresh cheese)
2 cups of cream or goat (pecant, cramy fresh cheese)

instructions: Cut the bread diagonally into thin slices.
Brush them with olive oil and salt them.
Add them to a baking pan and bake for about 15 minutes until golden.
We're cutting the prosciutto.
In a bowl, add the cream cheese, and the melon and rub pepper on top and mix.
Add a spoonful of melon cheese to each toasted slide.
From above, add the chopped prosciutto.

brussels-sprouts-with-bacon-and-parmesan.name: Brussels Sprouts With Bacon And Parmesan
brussels-sprouts-with-bacon-and-parmesan.original_name: Λαχανάκια Βρυξελλών με μπέικον και παρμεζάνα

ingredients.item: 3 tabletspoons of dried versions finely chopped
3 tabletspoons of dried versions finely chopped

instructions: Preheat the ocean to 200°C, in the air.
Cut the sprouts along the middle and add them to a baking pan.
Sprinkle with bacon, onion, salt and pepper.
Pour with the olive oil and mix well with the hands.
Spread the materials on one layer well, not to overlap. Bake for 30 minutes until the sprouts and bacon are golden, stringing once in half a year for uniform baking.
Once the Brussels sprouts are removed from the ocean, sprinkle them with some balsamic cream.
Serve by sprinkle with parmesan peels and pomegranate seeds.

buffalo-chicken-twice-baked-potatoes.name: Buffalo Chicken Twice-baked Potatoes

ingredients.prep: skinless chicken breasts, cut in bite-sized pieces

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Prick potatoes several times with a fork and place onto a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until potatoes are easily pierced with a fork, 1 1/2 to 2 hours. Check for doneness after 1 hour and then every 15 minutes until reached desired doneness.
While potatoes bake, heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add chicken; cook and stir until chicken is no longer pink in the center and juices run clear, about 5 minutes.

Cut potatoes in half horizontally; scoop out potato flesh into a large bowl and set skins aside. Stir in butter until melted and combined; season with salt and black pepper. Stir in chicken, 2 cups Cheddar cheese and Buffalo sauce until combined. Spoon potato filling back into empty skins. Sprinkle remaining 1 cup Cheddar cheese on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is hot and cheese melted, about 20 minutes.

2  rodajas de queso (cheddar o el de tu preferencia)

He scattering his cheeseburgers with spray oil to prevent them from pounding.
Put the burgers in the Airfryer basket, make sure they don't overlap.
Cooking the cheeseburgers for 8-10 minutes, giving them half-cooking for a golden uniform.
Add cheeseburgers and cook for another 1 minute to melt.
Meanwhile, mix mayonnaise, mustard and ketchup into a small bowl to prepare the salsa.
